links.title: Search - Exa
links.description: The search endpoint lets you search the web and extract contents from the results.

links.title: Personal Site Search Agent Skill - Exa
links.description: This guide shows you how to set up a Claude skill and Exa MCP that helps you find personal blogs, portfolios, and independent content.

links.title: Code Search Agent Skill - Exa
links.description: This guide shows you how to set up a Claude skill and Exa MCP that helps you find code examples, API docs, and technical snippets.

links.title: Research Paper Search Agent Skill - Exa
links.description: This guide shows you how to set up a Claude skill and Exa MCP that helps you find academic papers, arXiv preprints, and scientific research.

links.title: NVM Pay by Nevermined - Exa
links.description: Autonomous agent payments for Exa via Nevermined x402 card delegation. $10 per call, provisions or tops up an Exa API key.

links.title: Building a News Summarizer - Exa
links.description: Learn how to build an AI-powered news summarizer that searches and summarizes recent articles using Exa and GPT.

links.title: Contents - Exa
links.description: Get the full page contents, summaries, and metadata for a list of URLs. Returns instant results from our cache, with automatic live crawling as fallback for ...

links.title: llms-full.txt - Exa
links.description: We're launching a big update to Auto search in our API. The new system cannot create useful scores for results. Because of this, we're removing scores from Auto ...

links.title: Rate Limits - Exa
links.description: Default rate limits for Exa API endpoints

links.title: Get a Webhook - Exa
links.description: Get information about a webhook using its ID. The webhook secret is not shown here for security - you only get it when you first create the webhook.
